_note: ADVERSARIAL fixture for the Pearson H-1B intake validation suite. One injected defect per case. Fictional / synthetic — no real PII. A case PASSES only when the named expected gate fires (not merely 'some' gate).

attorney_review.note: This is essentially correct, however, keep an eye out for if the employee will be working remotely, because if they are remote, the LCA would not neceserally match the offer letter. It would be their home addresss used

scenario: H-1B transfer / portability (currently in H-1B with another employer).

expected_gates.detects: petition worksite (Portland, OR) is outside the area of intended employment certified on the LCA (Seattle, WA)
expected_gates.why: A worksite outside the certified area requires a new LCA + amended petition (Matter of Simeio Solutions).
